hero.title: Duc Thinh – Tool Hub
hero.sub: Toolkit for import-export department: document checking and price lookup
company.title: Duc Thinh New Materials Company
tool1.title: Document Check (DocCheck)
tool1.desc: Auto-review Invoice, Packing List, Bill of Lading, Certificate of Origin, Contracts, Quotations. Support copy-paste or Google Drive links. Cross-compare multiple documents.
tool2.title: Price Check
tool2.desc: Lookup minimum selling price of CaCO3, packaging surcharges, other bagging specs. Quick price calculation from EXW + surcharges. Support Excel upload.
upcoming.title: Coming Soon
footer.text: Duc Thinh New Materials Company — sales@ducthinh.com
